must_have_quals: Graduating with a CS or Software Engineering degree in Dec 2025 or by Summer 2026, Problem solver and out-of-the-box thinker, Willing to take risks and build product and systems for 1M+ users, Capable of building scalable systems, Excellent product instincts. core_responsibilities: Building new features for users in our live-streams, Implementing growth tactics and strategies to scale our buyer and seller flows, Building systems at scale that help us deliver a high trust marketplace experience, Writing product or system development code, Designing, implementing, and operating our most critical and scalable services, Carefully evaluating the technical tradeoffs of every decision, Supporting features at every phase, from design through implementation and launch, Triage product or system issues and debug/track/resolve by analyzing the sources of issues, network, or service operations and quality
job_summary: Whatnot is the largest livestream shopping platform in North America and Europe, enabling users to buy, sell, and discover various products. The role involves building new features, implementing growth strategies, and maintaining a high-quality marketplace experience.
